title: rubus vinealis f. glandulosus
intro: Rubus vinealis f. glandulosus, also known as the glandular wood raspberry, is a variant of the Rubus vinealis species, which is a type of bramble or thorny shrub. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus vinealis f. glandulosus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation and pain, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
